objective: AUTO_FOLDER_REFACTOR_BUGFIND: visibility refactors under lib to expose hidden import/provenance/endpoint assumptions without changing public behavior except proven regressions.
completedSlices: Added replayable regression in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser_regression_test.dart for generic URL metadata with origin fallback.
Extracted _ConnectionImportCandidate in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser.dart to make candidate values and hasImportValues invariant explicit.
Fixed _importFromFields to include fallbackBaseUrl before the hasImportValues gate, preserving serverId/profileId for generic URL imports whose baseUrl comes from the URL origin.

Extracted platform connect-intent payload parsing from features/servers/setup/navivox_connect_intent_source.dart into features/servers/setup/navivox_connect_intent_payload.dart so String-vs-Map payload and source provenance mapping are pure/replayable.
Added features/servers/setup/navivox_connect_intent_payload_regression_test.dart; it failed before the fix for padded source tokens being downgraded to manual.
Fixed pairingHandoffSourceFromPlatformPayload to trim platform source tokens before provenance mapping.
Added core/protocol/endpoint/navivox_endpoint_uri_regression_test.dart to characterize endpoint origin derivation, websocket path/query preservation, and non-HTTP compatibility behavior.
Exposed endpoint origin formatting via private _navivoxOrigin helper so HTTP scheme remapping does not depend on Uri.replace port normalization.
Fixed navivoxHttpBaseUrlFromEndpointUri to preserve explicit default ports (for example wss://host:443 -> https://host:443) while mapping websocket schemes to HTTP schemes.

Added features/servers/shared/connection_gateway/presentation_regression_test.dart; it failed before the fix for bare IPv6 addresses and then for explicit default websocket ports being dropped by Uri.parse(...).toString().
Extracted _GatewayAddressPortInput plus authority/endpoint URI helpers in connection_gateway/presentation.dart to make address-to-URI and selected-port steps explicit.
Fixed connection gateway parsing so bare IPv6 address fields are bracketed for URI parsing and explicit default ports from URI-looking addresses remain visible in baseUrl.
nextCandidates: features/servers/setup initialImport vs stream filtering invariant around hasValues and observer recording
features/servers/screens setup_screen _safeHandoffHostSummary display vs IPv6 bracket formatting
validationReceipts: dart run features/servers/setup/navivox_connect_intent_payload_regression_test.dart (failed before fix: platform source token should be trimmed before source mapping)
dart run core/protocol/endpoint/navivox_endpoint_uri_regression_test.dart (failed before fix: explicit default websocket port was dropped during HTTP base URL derivation)

dart run features/servers/shared/connection_gateway/presentation_regression_test.dart (failed before fix: bare IPv6 gateway addresses should parse; after first fix failed again: explicit default websocket port dropped)
